cast.name: 帕梅拉·苏·马丁 Pamela Sue Martin
贾斯汀·罗斯尼亚克 Justin Rosniak
麦克斯·菲普斯 Max Phipps
安妮·芬斯特尔 Anni Finsterer

introduction: NASA's Tidbinbilla Tracking station in Australia prepares for the re-entry of a decaying satellite containing a dangerous biological experiment. It is decided to bring it down near the station, for which job Dr Tony Masters, accompanied by his son Mike (Justin Rosniak), has been brought in to assist Dr Spencer. At the same time, and unknown to her, Dr Spencer's daughter Ali has been using her computer to hack in to the station and reprogram the dish to communicate with a decommissioned satellite. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous industrial espionage agent, has penetrated the station and is preparing to take charge of the re-entry process, causing havoc and a chase through the Australian countryside to find the potentially deadly satellite.
